$comment: ★ phase 4.7 golden snapshot — UC-PETSTORE-018 주문 등록 (★ ★ 5 단계 단일 트랜잭션 / BR-PETSTORE-ORDCRT-004 + BR-PETSTORE-SEQMGR-008 sequence).
sql_id: SequenceMapper.getSequence + updateSequence + ItemMapper.updateInventoryQuantity (per lineItem) + OrderMapper.insertOrder + insertOrderStatus + LineItemMapper.insertLineItem (per lineItem)

scenarios.name: happy path — 2 lineItem 주문 등록 (5 단계 atomic)

expected_db_state_after: SEQUENCE.ordernum NEXTID = 1001 (★ getSequence + updateSequence race window)
★ ★ INVENTORY EST-1 QTY = 10000 - 2 = 9998 + EST-2 QTY = 10000 - 1 = 9999 (lineItem 수 N+1 update)
ORDERSTATUS row 신규 (ORDERID=1000 / LINENUM=1000 / TIMESTAMP / STATUS='OK')
then.transaction_boundary: ★ 5 단계 모두 commit 또는 모두 rollback

intent_classification.note: ★ ★ 자체 sequence (DB native ❌) = multi-RDBMS 호환 의도 + race risk 동반

behavior_likely_bug: ★ AP-PETSTORE-006 — N+1 inventory update (lineItem 수 N → N SQL)
★ AP-PETSTORE-007 — sequence race condition (getSequence + updateSequence non-atomic 읽기-쓰기 race)
★ ORDERSTATUS LINENUM = ORDERID duplicate (schema design 의도 ambiguous)
